No. OK, and currently, can you tell me just a little bit about your living situation? Yeah, so I just live with uh, a couple of my roommates. I'm going to University. OK. OK, and how much would you say? Like 1 gram or less or? 1 gram probably lasts like 2 weeks. OK, and do you drink alcohol? Yeah, just a couple of beers maybe on the weekend.
